name: vercel-ai-schema-display
title: Schema Display
author: Vercel
description: An interactive API schema inspector for parameters, request data, and responses.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced caller-controlled dangerouslySetInnerHTML path highlighting with React text nodes.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing and icon direction for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced caller-controlled dangerouslySetInnerHTML path highlighting with React text nodes. Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing and icon direction for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
